data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a "Book Now" button on the Facebook page, which is a critical requirement for the use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the existence or functionality of this button. The linked use case explicitly states the need for a "Book Now" button on the Facebook page, and without evidence supporting its implementation, this requirement remains unfulfilled.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence or functionality of the "Book Now" button on the Facebook page.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
